STIPULATION TO ENTER JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TO HAVE IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF 930 HAYES ST. #11, DEFENDANTS FORFEIT RENTAL AGREEMENT & TO VACATE BY 3-31-98 AT 11:59P.M. PROVIDED THEY PAY FEBRUARY AND MARCH 1998 RENT. CLAIMS WAIVED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE DEALT WITH PER 1950.5CC. IF DEFENDANT'S VACATE AS OUTLINED, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
